title: Agent Bricks Supervisor Agent now supports nesting supervisor agents as subagent tools
body: You can now add another Supervisor Agent as a subagent tool, enabling nested multi-agent orchestration. See [Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/multi-agent-supervisor).

ref_links.text: Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system
